chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1106 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For hearing of CMA 5368/25 2.For hearing of main case 20-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Daim Ali Bhanbhro, Advocate for respondents/Sukkur IBA. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost their interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
